title: Separating, Filtering, Clarifying, Precipitating, and Still Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders
description: Set up, operate, or tend continuous flow or vat-type equipment; filter presses; shaker screens; centrifuges; condenser tubes; precipitating, fermenting, or evaporating tanks; scrubbing towers; or batch stills. These machines extract, sort, or separate liquids, gases, or solids from other materials to recover a refined product. Includes dairy processing equipment operators.

tasks.text: Dump, pour, or load specified amounts of refined or unrefined materials into equipment or containers for further processing or storage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate machines to process materials in compliance with applicable safety, energy, or environmental regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor material flow or instruments, such as temperature or pressure gauges, indicators, or meters, to ensure optimal processing conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Turn valves or move controls to admit, drain, separate, filter, clarify, mix, or transfer materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up or adjust machine controls to regulate conditions such as material flow, temperature, or pressure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine samples to verify qualities such as clarity, cleanliness, consistency, dryness, or texture.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start agitators, shakers, conveyors, pumps, or centrifuge machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect machines or equipment for hazards, operating efficiency, malfunctions, wear, or leaks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Collect samples of materials or products for laboratory analysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate processing instructions to other workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Turn valves to pump sterilizing solutions or rinse water through pipes or equipment or to spray vats with atomizers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain logs of instrument readings, test results, or shift production for entry in computer databases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove clogs, defects, or impurities from machines, tanks, conveyors, screens, or other processing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean or sterilize tanks, screens, inflow pipes, production areas, or equipment, using hoses, brushes, scrapers, or chemical solutions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure or weigh materials to be refined, mixed, transferred, stored, or otherwise processed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test samples to determine viscosity, acidity, specific gravity, or degree of concentration, using test equipment such as viscometers, pH meters, or hydrometers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install, maintain, or repair hoses, pumps, filters, or screens to maintain processing equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect pipes between vats and processing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble fittings, valves, bowls, plates, disks, impeller shafts, or other parts to prepare equipment for operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove full containers from discharge outlets and replace them with empty containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
